creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Many X11 updates are notified via xorg-announce@ and Repology. None of those seems to propagate into ports. This has already led to delays in security updates (e.g., bug 268963 and bug 270485 forced via VuXML). If x11@ team is no longer interested in X11 (unlike DRM, Mesa, Wayland, etc) then MAINTAINER needs to be reset to avoid misleading existing users.

https://repology.org/projects/?maintainer=x11%40freebsd.org&inrepo=freebsd&outdated=1

To subscribe:
https://lists.x.org/mailman/listinfo/xorg-announce (mail)
https://repology.org/maintainer/x11%40freebsd.org/feed-for-repo/freebsd/atom (RSS)
